subject_a: We built something for Hidden Craft
subject_b: 30 taps, zero phone number on your site
subject_c: Turn your website into your next reservation
body:
The self-serve tap wall at Hidden Craft is one of the more interesting concepts I've seen in San Diego — 30 rotating locals on draft with food built to match.

But your site is missing basics that cost you covers: no phone number, no hours listed, and no way for someone to ask a quick question before heading down to India and C.

We built you a free preview — a redesigned homepage and a live AI chat agent that can answer questions about your tap list, handle catering inquiries, and book private events 24/7.

See it here: https://joshclifford.github.io/lvrg-previews/hiddencraftsd/index.html

Claim it free by booking a 15-min call: https://theresandiego.com/advertise/

Josh | LVRG Agency | lvrg.com | 619.361.7484
